products.name: Sparrow-Strike
products.descriptor: USFF MIL-SPEC rugged edge AI mission computer for autonomous and uncrewed vehicles

evidence.snippet:
Sparrow-Strike
--------------
MIL-SPEC rugged USFF edge processor integrating the NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX or SMARC x86 CPU. Next-gen edge AI compute solution. The world's first MIL-SPEC rugged Jetson Orin NX edge AI compute solution on the market.

#### MIL-SPEC Rugged
Engineered for austere environments. -40C to +55C operating temp, passive cooled. Fully sealed. Qualified to MIL-STD-810H, MIL-STD-461G, MIL-STD-1275E, MIL-STD-704F.

products.name: Kite-Strike II
products.descriptor: MIL-SPEC rugged SFF mission computer with NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin or Intel x86 COM-HPC for edge AI and autonomous missions

evidence.snippet:
*   Kite-Strike II
Kite-Strike II
--------------
MIL-SPEC rugged (certified) SFF mission computer integrating the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin or next-gen Intel x86 COM-HPC architecture that support a range of AI and compute at the edge applications.

#### MIL-SPEC Rugged
Engineered for austere environments. Qualified to MIL-SPEC environmental standards. -46C to +65C operating temp, IP67 sealed. MIL-STD-810H, MIL-STD-461G, MIL-STD-1275E, MIL-STD-704F.

products.name: Hawk-Strike IV
products.descriptor: Fully rugged SFF LRU embedded edge computer with Intel Xeon/Core CPU and NVIDIA GPU for multi-mission defense applications

evidence.snippet:
*   Hawk-Strike IV
Hawk-Strike IV
--------------
Fully Rugged Multi-Mission Embedded Computer. High-performance workstation-class single line replaceable unit (LRU) solution

*   Qualified to MIL-SPEC environmental standards.
*   Operating temperature: -40C to +60C (configuration dependent)
*   MIL-STD-810H Shock | Vibration | Altitude | Humidity | Sand and Dust | Fluids/Rain | Explosive Atmosphere
*   MIL-STD-461G EMI/EMC
*   MIL-STD-1275E/704F 28VDC Power (no power hold-up)
*   IP66 sealed

products.name: Raven-Strike II
products.descriptor: MIL-SPEC rugged server-class embedded computer with Intel Xeon SP and NVIDIA GPU for intensive tactical edge workloads

evidence.snippet:
*   Raven-Strike II
Raven-Strike II
---------------
MIL-SPEC rugged server-class compute solution, purpose-built for highly intensive workloads in austere environments. High performance, highly configurable with robust IO, high-capacity, high-speed storage.

##### Environmentals
*   MIL-SPEC rugged and sealed
*   Operating temperature: -40C to +55C forced-air cooling
*   MIL-STD-810H Shock | Vibration | Altitude | Humidity | Sand and Dust | Fluids/Rain
*   MIL-STD-461G EMI/EMC
*   MIL-STD-1275E 28VDC Power (no power hold-up)
*   IP66 sealed

unresolved_questions: NDAA compliance: The site claims 'Proudly Made in the USA' and holds ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D:2016 certifications, but no product-level NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim was found in any fetched page. All products marked not_disclosed.
Blue UAS: No Blue UAS cleared-list reference found for any product.

Category assignment for embedded mission computers (Sparrow-Strike, Kite-Strike II, Hawk-Strike IV, Raven-Strike II) uses flight_and_vehicle_control as these are onboard mission computers purpose-built for autonomous/uncrewed vehicles; the rackmount servers (RM, IPC, Gray Wolf, SB, HR, Arctic Wolf) use ground_segment reflecting their GCS and vehicle-rack deployments.

Raven-Strike II is a server-class embedded computer (larger form factor than the other Strike series) but retained under flight_and_vehicle_control given its tactical edge deployment profile and EW/C-UAS applications.

fetch_requests.reason: Certs and Docs page linked from every product page — may contain explicit NDAA or other compliance claims needed to resolve ndaa=not_disclosed for all 15 products.
fetch_requests.source_hint: linked from every product page footer as 'Certs and Docs'
